meta.title: Staffing for Mission, Not Just Headcount
meta.description:
From the S4x25 stage, Daniel Swann made the case for something too many overlook.

Veterans, reservists, and guardsmen bring more than technical skills to a SoC. They bring pressure-tested judgment, mission focus, and the kind of persistence you can’t teach.

If you want people who care as much as you do, start there.
